meta.description: Full-featured blog theme (posts, categories, tags, archives, knowledge base, and custom pages).

colors.title: Colors
colors.description: Matches the light/dark toggle in the site header; configure light and dark modes separately

light.title: Light mode
light.description: Applies when visitors disable dark mode

dark.title: Dark mode
dark.description: Applies when visitors enable dark mode

themeConfiguration.title: Header & link directory
themeConfiguration.description: Fixed navigation, /nav cards, and aggregated search

displayTitle.label: Site title
displayTitle.description: Leave empty to inherit from Settings → General

displayTagline.label: Site tagline
displayTagline.description: Leave empty to inherit from Settings → General

siteLogo.label: Site logo
siteLogo.description: Leave empty to inherit from Settings → General

siteFavicon.label: Site favicon
siteFavicon.description: Leave empty to inherit from Settings → General

siteNotice.label: Site notices
siteNotice.description: Inherits from Settings → General when unset; configure multiple notices and order for this theme

aboutUsGithubUrl.label: GitHub link
aboutUsGithubUrl.description: Header and footer GitHub icon; hidden when empty

backgroundColor.label: Background color
backgroundColor.description: Page and content background; main area becomes transparent when a background image is set

backgroundImage.label: Background image
backgroundImage.description: Overrides solid background when set (visible on wide screens)

options.title: Twenty Twenty-Five
options.description: Header navigation, /nav link directory, and aggregated search

locale.title: i18n key
locale.description: Key in the site i18n bundle (e.g. home, nav). zh/en strings live in database setting.i18n, merged with toolkit language packs by default.

label.title: Fixed label
label.description: Same text in every language; leave empty to use the locale key for translation.
